mapper.insert: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO tb_image_collection_config (create_time,update_time,task_id,device_id,channel_id,device_name_snapshot,channel_name_snapshot,retention_policy,capture_options,version) VALUES (#{config.createTime},#{config.updateTime},#{config.taskId},#{config.deviceId},#{config.channelId},#{config.deviceNameSnapshot}, #{config.channelNameSnapshot},#{config.retentionPolicy},#{config.captureOptions},#{config.version})

INSERT INTO tb_image_collection_config (create_time,update_time,task_id,device_id,channel_id,device_name_snapshot,channel_name_snapshot,retention_policy,capture_options,version) VALUES (#{config.createTime},#{config.updateTime},#{config.taskId},#{config.deviceId},#{config.channelId},#{config.deviceNameSnapshot}, #{config.channelNameSnapshot},#{config.retentionPolicy},#{config.captureOptions},#{config.version}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_image_collection_config WHERE task_id=#{taskId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_image_collection_config WHERE device_id=#{deviceId} AND channel_id=#{channelId} ORDER BY create_time DESC,id DESC
SELECT FROM tb_image_collection_config WHERE device_id=#{deviceId} AND channel_id=#{channelId} ORDER BY create_time DESC,id DESC
